results.title: Cursor pagination on `id` (the recommended workaround for skip+limit) is also non-deterministic
results.summary: 3 runs of cursor pagination (orderBy={"id":"asc"}, no skip, page 2+ uses where={id:{gt:lastIdOfPrevPage}}) returned mostly-disjoint ID sets across runs. Min Jaccard = 0.053 across 3 pairs. Per-run page sizes were uniform (run1=100/100/100, run2=100/100/100, run3=100/100/100); the non-determinism is in *which* ids each run returns, not how many.
